info.title: News Aggregator API
info.description: Backend API for fetching and serving aggregated news articles from multiple third-party sources.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of per-source API fetch results. Filterable by source and status.

get.summary: Get a single API fetch log

get.description: Paginated article list. Supports full-text search and filtering by date, source, category, author, language, and sentiment. Multi-value filters accept comma-separated strings.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Published on or after this date (Y-m-d)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Published on or before this date (Y-m-d)

parameters.name: source_name
parameters.description: Filter by publisher name, comma-separated (e.g. BBC News,CNN)

get.description: Returns a paginated history of cron runs with status and source counts.

get.summary: Get a single cron log with its API logs

200.description: Cron log with nested API logs

get.description: Returns all active news publisher sources. Use the `name` field to populate a source filter dropdown.
Returns all distinct category values found in articles. Use these to populate a category filter dropdown.
Returns all distinct author values found in articles. Use these to populate an author filter dropdown.

post.summary: Trigger fetch for all active sources
post.description: Dispatches background jobs for every active article endpoint. Returns immediately (HTTP 202) after queuing; articles are saved asynchronously.

post.summary: Trigger fetch for a single source
post.description: Dispatches background jobs for all active article endpoints belonging to the given source slug. Returns immediately (HTTP 202) after queuing.

422.description: No active article endpoints for this source

get.description: Calls the NewsAPI.org /everything endpoint with your parameters and returns mapped articles. Results are NOT saved to the database.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Keywords or phrases to search in article title and body

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of results to return (default 20, max 100)

get.description: Calls the NewsData.io /latest endpoint with your parameters and returns mapped articles. Results are NOT saved to the database.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Next page token (returned in previous response as next_page)

get.description: Returns all configured third-party news API sources. Credentials are excluded.

get.summary: Get a single news API source
get.description: Returns source configuration including request config and response mapping. Credentials are excluded.

NewsSource.description: An individual news publisher (e.g. BBC News, CNN) tracked per API provider.

tags.name: News Fetch
tags.description: Trigger news fetching from third-party APIs

tags.name: Filters
tags.description: Filter dropdown values for the frontend (sources, categories, authors)
